claim: Tier 7.1m closed the NAB adapter-policy loop: Tier 7.1h-7.1l show partial/local NAB signal and a same-subset false-positive repair candidate, but no held-out public usefulness confirmation. The gate narrows the NAB claim, stops adapter-policy tuning, and routes the next work to general cost-aware policy/action selection.
caveat: Evidence synthesis and decision gate only; not a new benchmark score, not public usefulness proof, not a promoted mechanism, not a baseline freeze, not hardware/native transfer, and not AGI/ASI evidence.
